landing.sub: Verified counterparties. Real deals. Free to join, free to trade.

stage.sampleNote: Format example. It shows how a deal is written on Ponte. It is not a live listing.

ai.heading: Facts in. Deal out.
ai.body: You enter the facts you have. The write-up interprets only those, never invents, and a person reads it before anything publishes.
ai.sample: Bankable sugar parcel on confirmed LC, standard export spec, ready for a Rotterdam-region buyer.

pricing.heading: Free to join. No commission on deals you close yourselves.
pricing.body: Posting an offer or a requirement, reading the board and connecting with a counterparty cost nothing. Verification and intelligence are paid in credits, and the desk is paid only if you ask it to broker a deal.
pricing.desk: Desk brokerage is a success fee or a retainer, agreed in writing before any work starts.
